description: Canonical document impact matrix for Plan-Driven completion-time checks.
lite_plan_policy: Lite plan tasks may skip document impact checks entirely when they do not affect user-visible behavior, API contracts, storage/message bus, auth/security, or workflow policy.

feature.notes: Use when a change introduces new capability, new workflow, visible UI/state, new message action, storage key, or user-facing limitation.

must_check: USER_GUIDE.md or help.html when user-visible behavior or wording changes
bug_fix.notes: Pure internal fixes may skip user-facing docs, but the final report must state why.

must_check: docs/guides/PROJECT_STRUCTURE.md when module boundaries or file organization change
refactor.notes: Behavior-preserving local cleanups may skip doc edits, but the final report must state why.

must_check: relevant docs/guides/* when workflow expectations change
decision_change.notes: Use for architecture, storage strategy, cross-environment protocol, dependency, or other review-visible tradeoff changes.
